minimum_required_companions: inputs>=1; assertions include observation or hash_binding
vc_or_scitt_packaging_relevance: May later be wrapped or logged as a source-capture receipt
c2pa_relevance: Relevant only when the observed source itself carries content credentials or provenance claims
non_claim_emphasis: No truth, legality, compliance, certification, safety, or completeness claim
paper_or_thesis_use: Methods paragraph on source capture and retrieval provenance

vc_or_scitt_packaging_relevance: May become a portable normalized-text or field-extraction receipt
c2pa_relevance: Relevant when extraction concerns synthetic-media provenance fields
non_claim_emphasis: No truth or authenticity-finality claim from extraction alone
paper_or_thesis_use: Appendix row on normalization and OCR/translation boundaries

likely_rats_role: Attester-like process statement about coding output
vc_or_scitt_packaging_relevance: May be wrapped as a bounded classification receipt
c2pa_relevance: Usually indirect unless media provenance is itself coded
non_claim_emphasis: No allegation-truth, guilt, legality, or safety claim
paper_or_thesis_use: Methods/results bridge for evidence-tier and taxonomy assignment

minimum_required_companions: review_status; review_notes>=1; assertions include review_decision or uncertainty_note

c2pa_relevance: Can flag provenance ambiguity but not settle authenticity
non_claim_emphasis: No substantive validation of the underlying allegation or legal meaning
paper_or_thesis_use: Hostile-reviewer control surface and limitations table

minimum_required_companions: assertions include cluster_membership; subject kind restricted to duplicate_cluster/case_record
vc_or_scitt_packaging_relevance: Could be logged as cluster-control provenance for release bundles
non_claim_emphasis: No recurrence, event-identity certainty, or prevalence claim from linkage alone
paper_or_thesis_use: Duplicate-control figure caption and methods note

minimum_required_companions: outputs>=1; subject kind artifact; assertions include artifact_derivation

c2pa_relevance: Indirect unless the published artifact summarizes source-side media provenance
non_claim_emphasis: No signed/logged/issued implication unless concrete receipt fields support it
paper_or_thesis_use: Appendix sample receipt and dashboard provenance caption

minimum_required_companions: inputs>=1; outputs>=1; assertions include review_decision or uncertainty_note explaining replacement
